LSE-MS8-L4-1400P-MSELA8-HJD-EUR-01 • MS ELA Grade 8 • Cite Textual Evidence

The Ribbon in the Mill

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
Why does the boy think the mill girl keeps the ribbon?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete academic justification. State your claim about the boy’s reasoning, support that claim with what he says in the conversation, and articulate the conclusion that follows about why the girl keeps the ribbon.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  CCSS RL.8.1  |  MS ELA Grade 8: Cite Textual Evidence
